name: Extraño
description:
With a cosmic destiny for the human race designed by Guardian Herupa Hando Hu and the Zamaron Nadia Safir they came to Earth to find ten people to be the bearers of humanity into the new millennium. The only problem is The Manhunters were very bitter about how they were treated after the Guardians abandoned them when they formed the Green Lantern Corps, The Manhunters laid in wait for centuries waiting for this moment. They had sleeper agents all over the universe, including Earth; they did everything they could to stop Herupa and Nadia from fulfilling their chosen duty.

Upon traveling to Peru to obtain one of the Chosen, Herupa and Nadia decide on a young man named Gregorio De La Vega; the eighth to be visited by Herupa and Nadia. Just like all of the Chosen, Herupa and Nadia told him in his own language that “We have chosen ten people on Earth to advance the human race, and one of the ten is you! The heroes and heroines of Earth join us in asking you to leave this life and enter the future”. However Gregorio flat-out refused to help Herupa and Nadia, and would have committed if not for the Flash's intervention, which led him to accept his destiny. He saw new hope and purpose in his life and chose the name "Extraño" for himself, which in Spanish means "Strange", for he saw himself to be very different from others in the superhero realm.
creator: Gryphon1876
